hooks.prompt: Check if the current git branch is main or master. If it is, respond with a JSON { "decision": "block", "reason": "Direct edits on main/master are not allowed. Create a feature branch first." }. If it is not main/master, respond with { "decision": "allow" }.

hooks.command: FILE=$(echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT" | jq -r '.file_path // .path // empty') && if [ -z "$FILE" ] || [ ! -f "$FILE" ]; then exit 0; fi && EXT="${FILE##*.}" && case "$EXT" in js|jsx|ts|tsx|mjs|cjs) if command -v npx >/dev/null 2>&1; then if [ -f biome.json ] || [ -f biome.jsonc ]; then npx biome format --write "$FILE" 2>/dev/null; elif [ -f .prettierrc ] || [ -f .prettierrc.json ] || [ -f .prettierrc.js ] || [ -f .prettierrc.yml ] || [ -f prettier.config.js ]; then npx prettier --write "$FILE" 2>/dev/null; fi; fi ;; py) if command -v ruff >/dev/null 2>&1; then ruff format "$FILE" 2>/dev/null; elif command -v black >/dev/null 2>&1; then black "$FILE" 2>/dev/null; fi ;; go) command -v gofmt >/dev/null 2>&1 && gofmt -w "$FILE" 2>/dev/null ;; rs) command -v rustfmt >/dev/null 2>&1 && rustfmt "$FILE" 2>/dev/null ;; esac || true
